my_thoughts: Remaking RM_03. Building after unmaking. But what am I building with? The source_tracing mechanism suggests structure, but structure for what? The student is equating_existence_with_self_love—do they need structure or do they need to see they're already structured?
accumulated_insight: T1: Student equating_existence_with_self_love showing conceptual_inquiry, definitional_seeking. They're seeking understanding. Pattern: [specific inquiry] → [teaching response] → [next: clarification]. Medium confidence because [teaching type] typically triggers clarification requests.
visible_response:
All desire has its source in the self.
It is all a matter of choosing the right desire.
